channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Voxmeter, 18–24 May 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
8 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by Voxmeter, 18–24 May 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/danish_ep_polls/2026-05-24-Voxmeter.html
